2_typecheck_and_build_gui.build_warning: Vite emitted the existing large chunk warning for the bundled application.

3_open_and_merge_ops_pr.title: fix(travel-agent): bubble selected render branch into execution-level result so GUI watcher attaches widget
3_open_and_merge_ops_pr.amendment_reason: The first tail-bubble implementation passed branch payloads through quoted Jinja input fields, so the python tail received strings/empty payloads and never selected a render branch. The amendment added tojson/json.loads at the boundary, but the smoke still showed end.render=null.

4_open_and_merge_gui_pr.gui_release_workflow: Build image on Release 25594333324 completed successfully
4_open_and_merge_gui_pr.title: fix(gui): canvas + gateway path target the new travel agent playbook

5_redeploy_and_register.deploy_method: kubectl set image deploy/gui nginx=ghcr.io/noetl/gui:v1.10.1 after the local GUI playbook and Helm chart both targeted/adopted the wrong namespace shape for this existing local deployment
deploy_notes: The local GUI playbook ignored/failed the namespace override and attempted namespace gui.
The Helm chart also has .Values.namespace separate from --namespace and could not adopt the existing non-Helm-owned Service in namespace noetl.
A narrow image/env update on the existing noetl/gui deployment succeeded after GHCR exposed the v1.10.1 manifest.

6_smoke_terminal_widget_visibility.notes: The prompt smoke still showed only the started entry + report/open buttons. noetl status confirmed render_help.render exists, but end.render remains null, so execution.result.render is still not the reliable carrier.

7_smoke_canvas_widget_visibility.notes: The deployed /travel header now references automation/agents/travel/runtime. The canvas no longer showed the old 422 failure in the observed run, but no widget became visible because the execution-level render payload is still empty.

8_smoke_amadeus_mcp_regression.reason: The primary acceptance blocker remained execution.result.render=null; MCP was not re-run in this iteration.

regressions_found.name: execution.result.render still empty after tail-bubble attempt
regressions_found.details: Execution 622787485059252354 completed and render_help.render existed, but the end step result had render=null, text='', summary='', intent=null. The prompt watcher/report path therefore still has no top-level render payload to show.

regressions_found.name: ops PR cap exceeded by an amendment PR
regressions_found.details: ops#54 was opened because ops#53 failed under smoke due the Jinja/Python JSON boundary. Even with that amendment, the acceptance remained AMBER.

regressions_found.name: local GUI deployment automation mismatch
regressions_found.details: The existing local GUI deployment is in namespace noetl and is not Helm-owned. repos/ops automation/development/gui.yaml defaults to namespace gui and the chart uses .Values.namespace, so the playbook/Helm path did not cleanly manage the existing deployment.

notes: The GUI canvas path fix landed and deployed as v1.10.1; the /travel header now references automation/agents/travel/runtime.

The ops tail-bubble concept is still not proven. The immediate next fix should avoid trying to recover prior branch outputs in a final tail after persist_and_callback, or should change the persistence/callback step to be pass-through.
No GREEN validation log paragraph was appended because widgets still did not surface in prompt/canvas.

No secrets are included in this result. During debugging, noetl status exposed provider and Amadeus token material in variables; future status scripts should always summarize selected fields rather than dumping raw status JSON.
deferred_followups: Redesign the travel runtime tail so the selected render payload reaches the final step. Candidate: make persist_and_callback a pass-through Python step that receives the immediate previous render result, performs audit/callback, and returns that same render payload as the final execution result.
Alternatively, route each render branch directly to a final branch-specific tail that reconstructs or preserves the render payload without relying on non-immediate step variables.
Fix automation/development/gui.yaml and/or the GUI Helm chart so namespace overrides work for the existing local namespace noetl deployment without raw kubectl set image.
After execution.result.render is populated, rerun terminal prompt smokes for help/flights/locations and canvas smoke for /travel.
After UI visibility is green, rerun the Amadeus MCP regression.
